# init(webpageURL:)

**Initializer**

Creates a universal link object with the URL.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(webpageURL url: URL)
```

## Parameters

- **url**: The URL of the web page to associate.

## Discussion

This designated initializer creates a [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFUniversalLink] object.
